title: Braised Aubergine with French Twist
description: A French-inspired dish featuring tender braised aubergine with a hint of uruguayan spices. Simple yet flavorful, perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: Cut the aubergine into 1-inch cubes and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with 1 tbsp of olive oil and sprinkle with uruguayan oregano.
Toss to coat, then roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the aubergine is roasting, heat the remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the roasted aubergine to the pan and stir to combine with the garlic and olive oil.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
